briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to vote on rezoning amendment for Barker + Olive development
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would amend Burnaby's zoning map to allow changes to the 'Barker + Olive' development plan, updating the rules for what can be built on that land.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council adoption decision in 2026 — this could affect nearby property and development plans.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Zoning Amendment Bylaw No. 14782 — third reading passed
Burnaby Zoning Amendment Bylaw No. 14782 — final adoption vote
